1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px corporate fulfillment pipeline interface split canvas)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Kanban Board Split Layout (Left Navigation: Multi-Tenant Tenant Filter & Document Flow Status Tree; Center Board Canvas: Sales Order State Board tracking columns [Staged -> Credit Approved -> Staged for Pick -> Invoiced -> Fulfilled]; Right Sliding Side Drawer Panel: Real-Time Event Dispatch Logs & Cross-Domain Outbox Message Monitor)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders full Kanban processing lanes alongside active asynchronous system dispatch details)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The Kanban board switches to an interactive dense row list matrix grid layout with dynamic state dropdown indicators)

key_visible_sections.title: Asynchronous Event Mesh Outbox Telemetry Console

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active sales or finance processing clearance tokens -> Clear local state message variables caches -> Execute data payload fetch from CustomerRelationshipService.getSalesOrders()
user_progression_routes.on_order_stage_move: Evaluate target workflow rule constraints, evaluate credit threshold indicators, and auto-dispatch mutation logs packets to backends

redirection_rules.condition: If an active order's transaction value breaks customer multi-tenant credit limit constraints maps
redirection_rules.action: Force intercept order movement steps, transition card visual layout wraps instantly into a dark crimson highlight pattern, and route layout flag variables parameters locally to 'Credit Review Hold Active'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User drops order card container element into 'Credit Approved' column lane or hits action command 'btn_confirm_sales_order'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop confirmation alert modal asking user to sign the submission context, which fires the backend outbox publisher routine emitting global event signals

props.variant: Primary Revenue Success Blue Green Accent

molecules.composition: Combines sales order serial sequence identifier key + customer account corporate name label + total aggregated quote value text box + priority tracking pill + execution action button triggers
Combines micro message topic status dot indicator + tracking transaction event payload name row string (e.g., crm.sales.order.confirmed) + transactional outbox balance status badge

organisms.composition: Horizontal flex pane system organizing multiple state columns lanes container blocks, looping elements, and managing individual interactive sales_order_kanban_card instances drag events hooks.

Dense scrolling log container listing consecutive items collections data arrays instances of outbox_message_trace_node tracking blocks mapping transaction outbox synchronization metrics rules definitions.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, sans-serif (Precision monospaced fonts stack used strictly on sequence reference numbers and monetary balances blocks to verify horizontal grids alignments)

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer)
color_palette_hex.order_confirmed_blue: #3B82F6 (Corporate Royal Blue Order Flow Management Core Accent Focus)
color_palette_hex.credit_hold_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Financial Overdraft/Risk Hold Status Variable Line Glow)
color_palette_hex.telemetry_log_dark: #111827 (Charcoal Dark Interface Console Box Layout Background Panel Fill)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px workspace block partition column boundaries default spacing margins)
spacing_and_borders.kanban_card_inner_gap: 0.75rem (12px internal padding padding metrics inside board asset cards layouts)
spacing_and_borders.border_radius_tokens: 0.375rem (6px modern industrial clean hard corner cuts design metrics framing)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: cursor swapping to 'grab' styling properties parameter; border-color changes to #3B82F6 over an instantaneous 80ms execution curves parameters window framework
opacity modifier values parameter drops downward to scale marker 0.50; transform rotation element scale switches to rotate(1deg)

accessibility_aria_roles.sales_orders_fulfillment_kanban_board_vi: role='application' parsing interactive tracking board lane matrices coordinates grouping controls maps
accessibility_aria_roles.event_outbox_telemetry_drawer: role='log' accompanied by explicit aria-live='polite' configuration fields monitoring transaction processing logs events pushes asynchronously

CREDIT_HOLD_REVIEW.customer_corporate_name: Nippon Advanced Heavy Machinery Fabrication Ltd

local_reactive_state_variables.selected_sales_order_card_id: Tracks target captured order row entry lookups token string used to inflate operations drawers (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_issuance_modal_open: Boolean state variable tracking rendering state boundaries for layout system modal overlays wrapping outbox confirmation checks workflows
local_reactive_state_variables.active_kanban_board_lane_collection: Reactive layout object split container parsing ongoing card shifts, updating coordinates properties values lists elements parameters instantly before backend callbacks

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared systems global tenant context code routing multi-tenant application operations parameters scopes configurations data sets maps
global_application_context_bindings.asynchronous_kafka_outbox_telemetry_sync: Global websocket connectivity pipeline allocation handler forcing continuous background updates to logs stream views components when downstream microservices consume transactional events

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 asynchronous module classes implementing native browser drag-and-drop orchestration properties APIs with zero reliance on cumbersome external third-party layout dragging frameworks scripts structures
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Transitioning elements parameters and cards states inline within column board rows view structures following drag events drops must update layout tracking metrics arrays fields under a target execution runtime threshold boundary limit of 12ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind fetched structural fulfillment parameters maps directly inside local state data stores, then map target active key values to selected_sales_order_card_id to reveal telemetry console sections
Mutate local state tracking variable flag configuration is_issuance_modal_open value to true to launch global event outbox submission alert dialogue frames instantly

Push workflow command processing packets; append returning messaging telemetry lines logs directly inside transactional_outbox_realtime_log_stream local display states cache views arrays; toggle off issuance modal overlay flags variables parameters
